title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS is a framework providing AI coding agents with up-to-date AWS documentation, best practices, and guardrails for safer and more effective service interactions. The toolkit includes skills defined as Markdown runbooks, MCP plugin configuration, and integrations with AWS Lambda and API Gateway that reduce wasted agent effort through tested procedures.
